Notes: Single UPDATE deletes one A RR instance and re-adds the same owner/type/class/rdata with a different TTL. The follow-up query checks whether the server applied the re-add, rejected the update, or normalized TTL behavior.

Steps.Description: Delete ttltest.campus.edu. A 192.0.2.40, then re-add the same RR with TTL 600 in the same UPDATE.

Steps.Name: ttltest.campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe whether the RR remains present after the UPDATE.
